title: Certification
description: Certification bodies use this attestation when a subject passes certification.

@context.description: Optional JSON-LD context URI for semantic processing.

attester.title: Certification Body ID
attester.description: DID of the Certification Body issuing the certification.

subject.title: Recipient ID
subject.description: ID of the thing or entity being certified. For IDs not based on DID, use did:web:<product path>

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: DID of the parent organization that owns or governs the certification recipient. For example, when certifying did:web:example.com:service:api, set organization to did:web:example.com. Leave empty when certifying an organization itself.

version.title: Software Version
version.description: Software version of the certification recipient, if applicable.

versionHW.title: Hardware Version
versionHW.description: Hardware version of the certification recipient, if applicable.

subjectURI.title: Subject Informational URI
subjectURI.description: Optional URI that provides mutable, human-readable metadata about the certification recipient.

programID.title: Program ID
programID.description: DID of the certification program under which this certification was issued. Program release version should be included in the DID.

programURI.title: Program Informational URI
programURI.description: Optional URI for mutable, human-readable certification program info.

assessor.title: Assessor ID
assessor.description: ID of the authorized assessor (test lab, auditor) who evaluated the service.

assessorURI.title: Assessor Informational URI
assessorURI.description: Optional URI with human-readable info about the assessor (e.g., homepage, credentials).

reportURI.title: Report URI
reportURI.description: Optional URI to the certification report or assessment documentation.

payload.title: Certification Metadata
payload.description: Extended certification details. Always stored as a JSON-stringified object.

issuedAt.title: Issued Date
issuedAt.description: When the certification was issued by the certification body. Default is the current time.

effectiveAt.title: Effective Date
effectiveAt.description: Time the certification becomes effective. Default is the current time.

expiresAt.title: Expiration Date
expiresAt.description: Time the certification expires. Default is no expiration
